title.en: After a period of time, Ye Tian finally found a...

content.en:
Next, Ye Tian used this Polar Sun Spirit to copy his body and continue to explore in the Polar Sun Land.

Really.

His True Replica Body is often attacked, but the Aurora Spirit's Replica Body is not attacked, and this is simply his backyard.

After a period of time, Ye Tian finally found an opportunity.

......

Deep in the Land of the Polar Day.

Ye Tian saw a tree of light condensed by the power of the Polar Day, this tree of light contained the ultimate aura, and there were also some Polar Sun spirits cultivating here.

He knew very well that this Aurora Tree should allow the Ultimate Realm Masters to comprehend the ultimate rules, but it should be extremely suitable for the Ultimate Path of the Aurora.

The other ultimate systems comprehend this Aurora Tree, which should have no effect.

In other words, if you want to comprehend the ultimate rule, it is best to take the path of the polar day.

"Then if you can take advantage of the opportunity here to comprehend the ultimate rules and step into the main realm of the ancient ultimate realm, it will also be very good. "

So, Ye Tian began to study the ultimate way of the extreme day. 06

Time flies.

One Ultimate Realm Lord after another fell in the Land of Polar Day, and some Ultimate Realm Masters found the Polar Sun Gold and went out.

In fact, Ye Tian also found some Polar Day Gold, but he didn't go out, but studied it here.

The Aurora Gold was so hard that he couldn't destroy it, but he had studied it for a long time, but he hadn't found any special effects on it.

"The White Ghost Extreme Venerable should use the Polar Day's Gold to create a weapon, maybe that weapon will be of great help to the White Ghost Extreme Venerable's strength!"

Ye Tian guessed.

Before you know it, a long time has passed.

Outside the Land of the Polar Day.

Seeing that no Ultimate Realm Lord came out again, the White Ghost Extreme Venerable couldn't help but shake his head, "This group of high-level Ultimate Realm Masters is too wasteful, so they came out so little, and only brought out such a little Extreme Day Gold for me!"

Immediately, he left here, preparing to capture some more high-level Ultimate Realm Lords, and then let them enter the Land of Polar Sun to find some Polar Sun Gold.

However, just as he had grabbed another batch of Mighty Ultimate Realm Masters and was about to leave, he was intercepted by a figure.

"Heavenly Seal Extreme Venerable, what are you going to do?"

The White Ghost Extreme Venerable asked.

Tianyin Jizun said coldly: "White Ghost Jizun, you have gone a little too far, you have captured so many high-ranking people from Taiyi City, including the clansmen of the Dark Eagle Jizun, they are all dead now, why do you say I want to intercept you?"

"A swarm of ants, if you die, you die!"

The White Ghost Extreme Venerable didn't care at all.

Rumble!!!!

The Heavenly Seal Extreme Venerable and the White Ghost Extreme Venerable fought and killed, and directly beat the White Ghost Extreme Venerable with their strong strength.

In particular, the weapon of the Heavenly Seal Extreme Venerable, the Heavenly Seal, was the top-level ultimate weapon, directly suppressing him, making it difficult for him to exert his strength.

Soon.

The White Ghost Extreme Venerable was beaten to the point where he was not lightly injured and quickly fled, while the Heavenly Seal Extreme Venerable continued to chase and kill.

In a short period of time, the White Ghost Extreme Venerable will not be able to go to this place in the Land of Extreme Daylight.

......

In the Land of the Polar Day.

Ye Tian is still comprehending the Extreme Day Ultimate System, and has already comprehended it, and is currently absorbing the power of the Extreme Day, condensing the Extreme Sun Body.

After comprehending the Extreme Day Ultimate Rule, and breaking through to the military level in the Extreme Day Ultimate System, that is, the main realm of the Extreme Realm, and then through the Extreme Day Light Tree, he quickly improved the Extreme Day Ultimate Rule, and gradually comprehended the Three Hundred and Sixty-Five Realm.

At this time, he also created the Ultimate Body Method of the Polar Day.

After that, he cultivated to the ultimate body.

Of course.

His True Replica Body had fallen several times in the Land of Aurora, and after each fall, a new True Replica Body was condensed from the Aurora Spirit's Replica Body.

His true body replica body still has to absorb the power of the power of the Aurora, otherwise how can he condense the ultimate body of the Aurora?

Another long time has passed.

More than 60,000 Ultimate Epochs have passed.

Ye Tian comprehended the Polar Day Light Tree, and then deduced it with the fragments of the Mishu Disk and other treasures, and was about to comprehend a trace of the ultimate rule of the Polar Day.

I have to say that this Aurora Tree is too suitable for comprehending the ultimate rule.

It's just that the comprehension of those Polar Sun Spirits is a bit spicy, and it seems that in the entire Polar Sun Land, only a few Polar Sun Spirits have comprehended the ultimate rules of the Polar Sun and reached the ancient level.

And now, Ye Tian is about to reach this level.

A few more days passed.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian's body was filled with wisps of the aura of the Polar Day's ultimate rule, and he had already successfully comprehended the Polar Day's ultimate rule.

And at the moment of breakthrough, his Aurora Ultimate Body seemed to have truly come to life, and he was able to exert the true power of the Aurora Ultimate Body.

"It's time to create a real ultimate killer move!"

Ye Tian muttered.

After that, he spent a lot of Ultimate Era years to create the first ultimate killing move.

【Blade of the Polar Day】

After this ultimate killing move was created, he could be regarded as truly reaching the ancient level of the Ultimate Realm Master.

After becoming an ancient level, he collected things like the gold of the Polar Sun in the Land of Polar Day, and even the things that the White Ghost Extreme Venerable wanted, he naturally wanted to collect as well.

Gradually, more and more Polar Day's Gold fell into Ye Tian's hands.

In addition, he also found a few places where 800 can assist in the comprehension of the ultimate rule, which may not be suitable for the comprehension of other ultimate rules, but if it is enlightenment, it still has some effect.

His current Extreme Day Ultimate Rule is the lowest one-fold realm, and it is still far from the twofold realm, so he has to comprehend and comprehend.

Meanwhile.

He also spent a lot of years researching the use of the Aurora Gold, and finally determined that the Aurora Gold was used to forge the ultimate weapon.

So, he began to create the forging method of the ultimate weapon, using the gold of the polar sun to forge it.

At first, it was all a failure, but after a lot of experimentation, the first ultimate weapon was finally forged.

Aurora Knife!

This Aurora Weapon is very suitable for the Aurora Ultimate Path, and this weapon is not an ordinary ultimate weapon, because the materials used are not ordinary.

Even if his forging level is very spicy, the grade of the Polar Day Knife should be very good among the ultimate weapons.

After that, he created a set of Aurora Armor for himself, and he succeeded in creating it, successfully raising his defense to a notch.

"This time, I really have to thank that Immortal-level White Ghost Extreme Venerable, if it weren't for him, I wouldn't have come to this Extreme Day Land!"

Ye Tian muttered.

After that, he continued to practice penances here, improving his strength and improving the ultimate rule of the Polar Day.
